en: In the seventh year of Jehu, Jehoash began to reign, and he reigned forty years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Zibiah of Beersheba.
zh: 耶戶在位第七年，約阿施登基，在耶路撒冷作王四十年。他母親名叫西比亞，是從別是巴來的。

en: And Jehoash did what was right in the eyes of the LORD all his days, because Jehoiada the priest instructed him.
zh: 在耶何耶大祭司教導他的日子，他就行耶和華看為正的事。

en: Nevertheless, the high places were not taken away; the people continued to sacrifice and make offerings on the high places.
zh: 只是邱壇沒有廢去，人民仍在邱壇獻祭焚香。

en: Jehoash said to the priests, "All the money of the holy things that is brought into the house of the LORD, the money for which each man is assessed- the money from the assessment of persons- and the money that a man's heart prompts him to bring into the house of the LORD,
zh: 約阿施對眾祭司說：“所有分別為聖，奉到耶和華殿裡的銀子，或是各被數點之人的贖價，或是各種的贖價，或是各人隨著心意，奉到耶和華殿裡的銀子，

en: let the priests take, each from his donor, and let them repair the house wherever any need of repairs is discovered."
zh: 各祭司可向自己熟悉的人收取。他們要修理殿內毀壞的地方，就是一切發現有毀壞的地方。”

en: But by the twenty-third year of King Jehoash, the priests had made no repairs on the house.
zh: 可是到了約阿施王在位二十三年的時候，祭司還未修好聖殿毀壞的地方。

en: Therefore King Jehoash summoned Jehoiada the priest and the other priests and said to them, "Why are you not repairing the house? Now therefore take no more money from your donors, but hand it over for the repair of the house."
zh: 於是約阿施王召了耶何耶大祭司和眾祭司來，說：“你們為甚麼不修理聖殿毀壞的地方呢？現在不要向你們熟識的人收取銀子，卻要把所收的交出來，修理聖殿毀壞的地方。”

en: So the priests agreed that they should take no more money from the people, and that they should not repair the house.
zh: 眾祭司答應不再從人民收取銀子，也不修理聖殿毀壞的地方。

en: Then Jehoiada the priest took a chest and bored a hole in the lid of it and set it beside the altar on the right side as one entered the house of the LORD. And the priests who guarded the threshold put in it all the money that was brought into the house of the LORD.
zh: 耶何耶大祭司搬來了一個箱子，在它的頂上鑽了一個孔，把它放在祭壇旁邊，在聖殿入口的右邊。守門的祭司把奉到耶和華殿所有的銀子都投進箱裡。

en: And whenever they saw that there was much money in the chest, the king's secretary and the high priest came up and they bagged and counted the money that was found in the house of the LORD.
zh: 他們看見箱內的銀子多起來的時候，就叫王的書記和大祭司上來，他們就數點在耶和華殿裡所得的銀子，裝在袋中。

en: Then they would give the money that was weighed out into the hands of the workmen who had the oversight of the house of the LORD. And they paid it out to the carpenters and the builders who worked on the house of the LORD,
zh: 他們把所稱的銀子交在耶和華殿中管理工匠的監工手裡，然後他們支付給在耶和華殿作工的木匠和建築工人，

en: and to the masons and the stonecutters, as well as to buy timber and quarried stone for making repairs on the house of the LORD, and for any outlay for the repairs of the house.
zh: 以及泥匠和石匠；又用來購買木材和鑿好的石頭，來修理耶和華殿裡毀壞的地方，以及支付一切修理耶和華殿的開支。

en: But there were not made for the house of the LORD basins of silver, snuffers, bowls, trumpets, or any vessels of gold, or of silver, from the money that was brought into the house of the LORD,
zh: 但耶和華殿裡的銀杯、燭剪、碗、號或任何金銀器皿，都沒有用奉到耶和華殿裡的銀子來做。

en: for that was given to the workmen who were repairing the house of the LORD with it.
zh: 他們只把銀子交給工匠，用來修理耶和華殿裡毀壞的地方。

en: And they did not ask an accounting from the men into whose hand they delivered the money to pay out to the workmen, for they dealt honestly.
zh: 他們沒有要求經手把銀子轉付工匠的人交代帳目，因為他們辦事誠實。

en: The money from the guilt offerings and the money from the sin offerings was not brought into the house of the LORD; it belonged to the priests.
zh: 但是贖愆祭和贖罪祭的銀子，他們沒有奉入耶和華的殿，這些銀子是屬於祭司的。

en: At that time Hazael king of Syria went up and fought against Gath and took it. But when Hazael set his face to go up against Jerusalem,
zh: 那時亞蘭王哈薛上來，攻打迦特，把它奪取了。他又決心上來攻打耶路撒冷。

en: Jehoash king of Judah took all the sacred gifts that Jehoshaphat and Jehoram and Ahaziah his fathers, the kings of Judah, had dedicated, and his own sacred gifts, and all the gold that was found in the treasuries of the house of the LORD and of the king's house, and sent these to Hazael king of Syria. Then Hazael went away from Jerusalem.
zh: 猶大王約阿施於是拿出所有的聖物，就是他的祖先猶大王約沙法、約蘭和亞哈謝所獻的聖物，以及他自己所獻的聖物，還有耶和華殿和王宮寶庫裡所有的金子，送給亞蘭王哈薛，哈薛就離開耶路撒冷去了。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Joash and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
zh: 約阿施其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

en: His servants arose and made a conspiracy and struck down Joash in the house of Millo, on the way that goes down to Silla.
zh: 約阿施的臣僕起來背叛，他們在米羅宮內，他下到悉拉的時候，擊殺了他。

en: It was Jozacar the son of Shimeath and Jehozabad the son of Shomer, his servants, who struck him down, so that he died. And they buried him with his fathers in the city of David, and Amaziah his son reigned in his place.
zh: 他的臣僕示米押的兒子約撒甲和朔默的兒子約薩拔擊殺他，他就死了。人把他埋葬在大衛城，和他的祖先在一起。他的兒子亞瑪謝接續他作王。
